ogTitle: Chilpenunda vs Chinaman Wells: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chilpenunda and Chinaman Wells.
heading: Chilpenunda vs Chinaman Wells — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chilpenunda, South Australia and Chinaman Wells, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chilpenunda has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Chinaman Wells (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chilpenunda or Chinaman Wells safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chilpenunda has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Chinaman Wells scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chilpenunda scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Chinaman Wells scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chilpenunda or Chinaman Wells?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chilpenunda has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
